calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-27-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Man Sau Chan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Tsz Kiu Lo and Hoi Kiu Lo, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Co-Petitioner: Hon Chiu Lo, the Minors' father not present, but signed the Petition.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Boris Tszkiu Lo and Alexis Hoikiu Lo.
Decree signed in open court.
